title: Winnin
description: Winnin and ABI teamed up during COVID times with the goal of making people's lives better. Data science was the key to translate the needs of consumers into services that would really fulfill them.

title: System Update
description:
System Update é um noticiário ao vivo em horário nobre apresentado pelo autor e jornalista vencedor do Pulitzer Glenn Greenwald. 

O programa aborda temas contemporâneos com análises precisas e anti-sistêmicas, além de reportagens investigativas, sem se prender a nenhum dogma ou facção.

title: Cinza
description: Cinza é uma agência de brand experience carioca com a proposta de ser uma alternativa ao marketing convencional.

title: Quality Experience
description: Quality Experience (QX) is an independent, full-service advertising agency on a mission to foster purposeful interactions between brands and their audiences by creating quality experiences. QX applies meticulous care to every aspect of their work, creating an environment where bold ideas can flourish.

credits.label: Strategist & Accounts:
credits.value: Ashley Einerson, Ann Kim, Maggie Giles

credits.label: Design:
credits.value: Julio Zukerman, Jonas Rudis, Igor Fajardo, Fernando Farfán, Kaan Iscan, Jordan Stokke, Marina Glikman, Sofia Noronha, Sasyk Mihal, Daniel Zepeda

title: Batch
description: BATCH revolutionizes post-production for film & television through it’s patent-protected batch processing technology that can create mattes for an entire film in hours instead of months. Created by and for filmmakers, BATCH allows more time in color & VFX sessions for creative artistry.

credits.label: Design:
credits.value: Julia Micelli Pitta, Sasyk Mihal, Juanse Carvajal, Lucas Luz, Matthew Roop

credits.label: Motion Design:
credits.value: Igor Fajardo, Matthew Roop, Julio Zukerman, Daniel Zepeda

title: GTF 23'
description:
Selva de pedra, mar de prédio, cidade da garoa. São Paulo é uma distopia. Mas é vida que pulsa em sua plenitude. A Gop Tun tem o prazer de ter nascido e crescido em São Paulo e vem exaltar essa cidade de contrastes com a segunda edição.São 33 artistas, a ponta de lança da música
eletrônica para a pista de dança, divididos em 4 pistas e 18 horas de festa.

title: COVID-19
description:
Se a vacina ainda não existe, porque o brasileiro cisma em agir 
como se estivesse imunizado?

Foi inspirado nesse cenário distópico que nasceu a ideia de criar uma campanha fajuta para a cura do corona.

title: Allyson Felix
description: Allyson Felix didn’t set out to be a revolutionary. She just wanted to run. But when the most decorated female Olympic track athlete faced a financial penalty after choosing motherhood, she found herself at the center of a cultural reckoning, pushing for basic maternity protections and challenging the very industry that had once celebrated her.

credits.label: Copywriting:
credits.value: Ashley Einerson, Lauren Walsh, Shannon Flood

credits.label: Design:
credits.value: Jessica Gracia, Igor Fajardo, Carol Pinheiro, Juanse Carvajal

title: Coolhaus
description: While some ice cream brands want you to try their Neapolitan, Coolhaus encourages you to savor the taste of fries dipped in your milkshake.

credits.label: Copywriting:
credits.value: Mike Harris, Nechama Muchnik, Emily Motti

title: GoodRx
description: GoodRx invited &Walsh to imagine an identity for a brand campaign that shows everyone there’s an incredible way to wrangle savings on overpriced medications. The system flexes across mediums, from digital to social to OOH to TV. We developed a custom typeface that was used for graphics and the TVC.

title: Nuevo,
description: Nuevo, é um escritório de Brasília especializado em Arquitetura Vernacular, cujos projetos são caracterizados pelo uso de materiais e recursos do próprio ambiente onde essas edificações estão inseridas.

title: FFFH
description: Female Founders for Harris is an initiative by women business leaders big and small for the Harris camapign. The goal is to amass the largest ever group of civically minded women business owners across the country in support of the campaign.

credits.label: Design:
credits.value: Lucas Luz, Jordan Stokke, Victor Jobim, Igor Fajardo, Lucas D'Ascenção

title: Off Bounds
description: Off Bounds é uma web série que busca desmistificar o conceito de liderança como algo utópico e inalcançável. Por trás de cada trajetória de sucesso, líderes de todas as partes do planeta enfrentam problemas mundanos como nós.

credits.label: Brand Strategy & Copywriting:
credits.value: Lucila Thompson, Lucas Noel, Igor Fajardo
